speeches.name: Michael S. Barr
speeches.summary: Governor Barr spoke on rural economic development at an event focused on strengthening America's economy through rural investment.

speeches.name: Beth M. Hammack
speeches.summary: President Hammack delivered remarks on the safe-haven status of the dollar during a panel discussion.

speeches.name: Susan M. Collins
speeches.summary: President Collins discussed observations on the economic outlook and small businesses at the Outlook 2026 event hosted by the Springfield Regional Chamber of Commerce.

speeches.name: Tom Barkin
speeches.summary: President Barkin considered the economic landscape amid renewed uncertainty in his speech 'Driving Through Economic Fog (Still)'.

speeches.name: Jerome H. Powell
speeches.summary: Chair Powell delivered a statement on the economy and monetary policy.

macro_fred.narrative: Leaning Hawkish: CPI at 3.3%, Fed Funds at 3.64%, unemployment at 4.3%.
